latest_commits.subject: Add Stage118 generic diagnostic eval path
Add Stage117B hard clean diagnostic scaffold
Lock reconstructed Stage117A vNext collapse synthesis

stage_chain_interpretation: Stage117-A locked the vNext external collapse interpretation and recommended a controlled hard-clean diagnostic.
Stage117-B added a controlled hard-clean diagnostic scaffold that can generate diagnostic JSONL from the clean controlled dataset.
Stage118 added a generic diagnostic evaluation path inside the training script.
No Stage119-A hard-clean failure audit artifacts were present in the repository before this audit.

hard_clean_failure_status.blocking_reason: The repository contains no local vNext checkpoint, prediction export, or Stage118 hard-clean evaluation summary to audit as model metrics.

recommendation.next_stage: Run Stage117-B hard-clean generation and Stage118 diagnostic evaluation in the environment that has the vNext checkpoint/run artifacts, then replace or extend this provenance audit with metric-backed Stage119 results.
do_not_claim: Do not claim hard-clean reproduces the external NOT_ENTITLED collapse until Stage118 prediction metrics exist.
Do not promote any hard-clean diagnostic result as external generalization.
Do not tune thresholds on VitaminC or train on external data for this audit.
